title: Add Podman relationship to readme, create container tools guide
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add a small description to list how Podman/Buildah interact to the main README.md, once approved this will be added to the Podman readme too.  Also start the Containers Tool Guide with more details.

comments.body: FWIW, I expect a few loops on this one.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Remove `rm` based on mheon comment and we can merge, then we can continue to fix it up in future PRs/

:pushpin: Commit c71b4aa has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan c71b4aa66987ec6cde1012cc534353cde51ef157 -->

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/05961173d7a34254fc7600a39512437ff74532b0.1536866535412883712/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 05961173d7a34254fc7600a39512437ff74532b0 to master...

I believe "someone" should be "somewhat" - very interesting comparison. I
am still noodling on it. I think it needs an example of each run command.

Best Regards
Scott M
